+            map_rel = ep

+            env_type = ep.split('/')[0] if '/' in ep else 'unknown'

+        try:

+        per_episode.append(entry)

+        per_type.setdefault(env_type, []).append(entry)

+

+    if per_episode:

+        travel_distance = 0.0

+        success_rate = 0.0
